source_intake_record.raw_question_text: To loosen a pipe fitting, a plumber slips a piece of scrap pipe (a ``cheater'') over his wrench handle. He stands on the end of the cheater as shown in figure. Find the magnitude of the torque he applies about the center of the fitting.
